general.title: General
general.description: Manage your account, privacy settings, notifications, and app updates.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for the app.

telemetry.title: Privacy & Telemetry
telemetry.description: Help improve {{productName}} by sending anonymous usage data.
telemetry.inactive: Inactive in this build (no PostHog keys)

autoGenerateName.title: Auto-generate task names
autoGenerateName.description: Automatically suggests a task name when creating a new task.

autoTrustWorktrees.title: Auto-trust worktree directories
autoTrustWorktrees.description: Skip the folder trust prompt in Claude Code for new tasks.
autoTrustWorktrees.infoContent: Only applies to Claude Code. Writes trust entries to ~/.claude.json before launching.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Get notified when agents need your attention.

sound.title: Sound
sound.description: Play audio cues for agent events.

osNotifications.title: OS notifications
osNotifications.description: Show system banners when agents need attention or finish (while Context is unfocused).

update.downloaded: Update ready. Restart {{productName}} to use the new version.
update.installing: Installing update. {{productName}} will close and restart automatically — this may take a few seconds.
update.error: Update temporarily unavailable — please try again later

agents.title: Agents
agents.description: Manage CLI agents and model configurations.
agents.defaultAgentDesc: The agent that will be selected by default when creating a new task.

repository.title: Repository
repository.worktreeDirDesc: The default directory where task worktrees are stored. Can be overridden per project.
repository.selectWorktreeMessage: Choose where new task worktrees will be created by default.
repository.autoUpdateGitignoreDesc: When Context writes CLI hook configs, also add their paths to .gitignore.

terminal.title: Terminal font
terminal.description: Choose the font family for the terminal.
terminal.autoCopyDesc: Automatically copy text to clipboard when you select it in the terminal.

customCommand.cliCommandDesc: The CLI command to execute (e.g., claude, codex)
customCommand.resumeFlagDesc: Flag used when resuming a session (e.g., -c -r)
customCommand.extraArgsDesc: Extra flags appended to the command (e.g. --enable-all-github-mcp-tools)
customCommand.envVarsDesc: Environment variables set when running the agent
customCommand.initialPromptFlagDesc: Flag for passing initial prompt (empty means pass directly)

customAgent.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this custom agent?
customAgent.name: Name
customAgent.idDesc: Unique identifier (auto-generated from name, lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens)
customAgent.cliDesc: The CLI command to execute (e.g., my-agent)
customAgent.resumeFlagDesc: Flag used when resuming a session (e.g., --resume)
customAgent.sessionIdFlagDesc: CLI flag to assign a unique session ID (e.g., --session-id)
customAgent.keystrokeInjectionDesc: Deliver initial prompt via keystroke injection instead of CLI arg
customAgent.installCommandDesc: Command to install this agent (e.g., npm install -g my-agent)
customAgent.envVarsDesc: Environment variables set when running this agent
customAgent.extraArgsDesc: Additional flags appended to the command

interface.title: Interface
interface.description: Customize the appearance and behavior of the app.

account.title: Account
account.createAccountDesc: Create a Context account to automatically connect GitHub using OAuth2.
account.reconnectDesc: Sign in again to reconnect your Context account.

common.installToMenu: Install this tool to show it in menu
common.shortcutRemovedDesc: {{label}} no longer has a key binding.
common.shortcutConflictDesc: Conflicts with "{{label}}". Choose a different shortcut.
common.serverUnavailable: {{productName}} server is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

status.noChangesDesc: Select or make changes to files to see diffs.

pr.title: Pull Requests
pr.prAlreadyOpen: A pull request is already open
pr.unavailableDesc: Pull requests are currently available only for configured GitHub remotes. You can change the remote in the project settings.
pr.unavailableDescFull: Pull requests are currently available only for configured GitHub remotes. You can change the remote in the project settings.
pr.noPRsDesc: Push your branch and create a PR to start a review.
pr.githubNotConnected: GitHub is not connected. Create a user account and connect your GitHub account to view pull requests.
pr.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, branch, or number...
pr.author: Author

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Extend your agents with reusable skill modules
skills.infoText: Skills from the OpenAI and Anthropic catalogs. Install a skill to make it available across all your coding agents. Skills follow the open Agent Skills standard. If you want to use skills from another library, feel free to let us know through the feedback modal.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.subtitle: Connect your agents with external data sources and tools
mcp.removeConfirmDesc: This will remove "{{name}}" from all agents. This action cannot be undone.

workspaces.getStartedDesc: Add a project to start working with AI-powered tasks, or create a workspace to organize multiple projects.
workspaces.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workspace?
workspaces.cannotRemoveProjectMsg: "{{name}}" cannot be removed from this workspace because it has {{count}} task_one}} {{count}} task_other}} associated with it.
workspaces.cannotRemoveProjectDetails: Archive or delete the tasks in this workspace first, then try again.
workspaces.noProjectsDesc: Add a project to this workspace to start working on tasks.
workspaces.noWorkspaces: No workspaces yet. Create a workspace to organize your projects.
workspaces.cannotRemoveProjectMsgShort: This project has {{count}} task_one}} {{count}} task_other}} in this workspace and cannot be removed.
workspaces.cannotRemoveProjectDetailsShort: Archive or delete the tasks first, then try again.

preservePatterns.title: Preserve patterns
preservePatterns.description: Gitignored files matching these glob patterns are copied from the main repo into each worktree. One pattern per line.

worktreeDir.title: Worktree directory
worktreeDir.description: Override where worktrees are created. Defaults to the app-level worktree directory setting.
worktreeDir.placeholder: Leave blank to use the default

defaultBranch.title: Default branch
defaultBranch.description: The branch new tasks are created from by default. Overrides the branch detected at project creation time.

remote.title: Remote
remote.description: The git remote used for fetching and syncing worktrees. Defaults to origin.

shellSetup.title: Shell setup
shellSetup.description: Shell commands run before the agent starts in each worktree session (e.g. nvm use).

tmux.title: Enable tmux
tmux.description: Run the agent session inside a tmux session.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle scripts
lifecycle.description: Shell commands run at each stage of the worktree lifecycle. One command per line.
lifecycle.docsSuffix: for the full project config reference.

signIn.connectGithub: Connect your GitHub account to Context
signIn.connectGithubSubtitle: This will allow you to work with your GitHub repositories in Context

addProject.title: Add Project
addProject.noProjectsInWorkspace: No projects in this workspace. Add projects first.

editor.noFileOpenDesc: Select a file from the tree to open it here

comments.addPlaceholder: Add a note about this line...

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.detailsPlaceholder: What do you like? How can we improve?

githubAuth.notConnected: GitHub is not connected. Connect your account to create a repository.

createPr.noRemoteWarning: No GitHub remote detected. Configure a GitHub remote to create pull requests.
createPr.skipPushDesc: Skip push and open a PR from the current remote state

createTask.title: Create Task in Workspace
createTask.allProjectsUseBranch: All projects will use this branch name.

error.title: Cannot delete project
error.message: "{{name}}" cannot be deleted because it is still associated with other resources.
error.details: It is linked to {{workspaceCount}} workspace(s) and {{taskCount}} task(s). Remove these associations first before deleting the project.

skills.installedDesc: {{skillId}} is now available across your agents

github.connectFailed: Failed to connect to GitHub. Please try again.
github.codeCopiedDesc: Paste it in GitHub to authorize

update.availableDesc: Version {{version}} is ready. Go to Settings to upgrade.
